title: Notion-grade editor chrome on official open-source parts
summary: Block drag-and-drop, the slash menu, and all suggestion popups were rebuilt on Tiptap's official MIT components (drag handle, Floating UI positioning, toolbar primitives with arrow-key navigation), fixing inconsistent handle and popup behavior. The editor also gains :emoji shortcodes and KaTeX math (^2$ inline, 97747…97747 blocks).
